title: Not Even Big Sisters Are Perfect

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an outing with Ines Fujin, I accompany her
to the amusement park where she'll be working
today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you're such a worrier! It's still bright
out—you didn't have to come all the way here
with me.
choice_data_list: Just think of it as the last stop of our trip.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, thanks! Okay, time to scrub this place
clean!

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ines! You're here early! What a relief!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heya-hey! What's got you in such a hurry?

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
We're a little short-staffed today, so I made some
last-minute changes to people's posts. Ines, you'll
be on haunted house duty!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: H-haunted house duty?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin freezes up as a disturbed expression
spreads across her face. I vaguely recall that she's
not great with scary stuff...
choice_data_list:
Are you going to be okay? Doesn't horror stuff
scare—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I-I'm just peachy! I can totally handle a haunted house!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Contrary to her claim, she looks anything but
peachy. Unable to ignore my concerns, I step in...
choice_data_list: Excuse me, but I happen to be her trainer...
Excuse me, but I happen to be her trainer...

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having changed into work attire, Ines Fujin
arrives at the haunted house looking disgruntled.
The reason being...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you worry way too much! I know my supervisor's fine with it and all, but asking to observe me on the job?
choice_data_list: Sorry, but I'm just worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I guess four hands are better than two.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The haunted house is closed right now because of
some machine malfunctions. No one else has been
assigned here, so you're helping me scrub this
place down!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Since you're here, I'll teach you the art of
cleaning! First, you start with the ceiling dust—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thunk!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Eeek?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Wh-whoa, what gives? Oh, looks like I got my
foot tangled in the vacuum cable... Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Phew! I think that's most of it done. I'm feeling
extra worn out today, though—huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, someone's left their cleaning cloth under the
sofa. Guess they forget to put it away. ...Okay,
got it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwip...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Fwip...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lying underneath the sofa, hidden out of view, is
a mummy puppet. Its eyes happen to meet Ines
Fujin's and—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Aaaargh?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Save me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Good work today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We somehow finish our cleaning duties, but Ines
Fujin looks completely exhausted. I feel like I
should break the silence...
choice_data_list:
It's okay to admit when you can't handle
something.

It's okay to admit when you can't handle
something.
It was interesting seeing you react like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We somehow finish our cleaning duties, but Ines
Fujin looks completely exhausted. I feel like I
should break the silence...
choice_data_list:
It's okay to admit when you can't handle
something.

It's okay to admit when you can't handle
something.
It was interesting seeing you react like that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, maybe I was being a little stubborn...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, my supervisor's kind enough to adjust my
shifts when I have training.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's why I was hoping to return the favor
somehow...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But if you hadn't been there, Trainer, I probably
would've only caused my supervisor a headache.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right! I should ask for help when I
need it. Okay, I'll show my gratitude with...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: A good race! I think that suits me best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come away impressed by Ines Fujin's strong
sense of duty—and by the way she somehow
utilized today's events to fuel her passion for
racing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you thought that was entertaining, huh?! Hey
now, it's not nice to tease people!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I made a real spectacle of myself today, huh? I was so lame!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you keep what happened today
between us? I'm really embarrassed about it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that no matter how lame she might have
seemed today, I won't tell a soul about it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You sure you can keep it secret? You might
never see me mess up this bad again, you know?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...But thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin smiles softly. It looks like this
experience has brought us even closer together!
